channel.title: VCF.PowerCLI on My Cloudy World

item.title: Viewing a Task Status Using Curl with SDDC Manager
item.description:
Interacting with the Public APIs for SDDC Manager can be achieved in many ways, my normal goto is PowerCLI but that requires the installation of the required modules and of course PowerShell itself to be available on either the component your wanting to interact with or a remote management host an alternative and faster method for interacting with the Public APIs then CURL is your new best friend.

Using Public API you can check the status of running tasks in SDDC Manager. In this post we look at how this can be achieved using either CURL or VCF.PowerShell
